zh-cn.consumable_10pulls_ticket_tooltip: 该道具暂无任何实际用途
zh-cn.currency_pyroxene_tooltip:
虽然可以用来抽卡，但由于该功能还未实装，因此没有什么意义
（暂时也没有做抽卡功能的想法）
zh-cn.consumable_emergency_ration_tooltip:
虽然味道难以恭维，但至少能保存很久，不用担心会过期
不可被生产，不能提供进餐指令
zh-cn.campaign_starfarers_guide_content:
在此剧本中，玩家扮演的‘老师’作为阵营“%%factionName_Utnapishtim%%”的管理者，需要确保所有学生的身心维持健康。
作为初始剧本，玩家和NPC的行动范围都十分受限，战斗系统因为还没开始做所以也不会任何危险
数值都还没开始填所以模拟经营的数值管理也不需要担心


首先，请在阵营管理界面添加‘外部阵营链接’，添加便利店
然后，在工作分配界面选择任意学生，[更改日程]，分配外派工作岗位去便利店打工挣钱
最后，在[订单生产]页的制造订单处添加一项制造饭团的订单，和在贸易订单处添加一项购买生米的订单（也可以直接购买现成食物，这样就不需要指派学生下厨了）
工资结算和贸易订单会在每日结束时进行

请至少确保每天能够生产等同于据点人口数量的%%tag_food_meal%%（食物会坏，所以过剩生产会被浪费）
请确保每天给学生安排了足够的工时来完成上述生产指标，且不要在学生工作时去打扰
只要满足了作为阵营管理者的义务（每日需求，食物，睡眠），老师就能获得学生们的信赖（人际关系还在施工中）

en-us.consumable_10pulls_ticket_tooltip: This item currently has no practical use.
en-us.currency_pyroxene_tooltip:
Although it can be used to pull, this item is useless because this functionality has not yet been implemented.
(There are currently no plans to implement any gacha function)
en-us.consumable_emergency_ration_tooltip:
Although the taste is unpalatable, it can be stored for a long time without expiring.
Count as meal item for the purpose of daily need, but cannot be manufactured, and cannot provide 'get meal' command
en-us.campaign_starfarers_guide_content:
In this scenario, the player takes the role of 'Sensei', is responsible for managing the faction '%%factionName_Utnapishtim%%', and needs to ensure all students maintain their physical and mental wellbeing.
As an initial scenario, the scope of this scenario is very limited, and is mainly focused on familiarizing with the daily simulation elements.


First, inside [%%comManager_bottom_management%%] tab, add the convenience store as %%ui_management_connectedFactions%%.
Then, select any student in [%%ui_management_tab_jobs%%], go to [%%ui_management_jobs_edit%%], and assign an %%ui_management_jobs_schedule_jobpost_ext%% to work at the convenience store to earn currency.
Finally, in [%%ui_management_tab_production%%] add some orders to either buy meals directly, or buy ingredient and make meals.
Salary and trade orders will be added/deduced from inventory at the end of each day.

Please ensure that every day you can produce/purchase as much %%tag_food_meal%% as the Facton population count (food will spoil in 1 day, so excess production will be wasted).
Please ensure that you have assigned enough work hours to meet daily production demands, and do not disturb your students while they are at work.
As long as you fulfill your obligations as a faction manager (ensuring everyone's daily needs, food and sleep), Sensei will gain the trust of the students (interpersonal relationships are still WIP).
